navbar.api_calls_tooltip: This daily limit of 50 AI calls exists to keep Mock Interview evaluation sustainable for everyone. Resets daily at midnight.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_sessions_desc: Create a session and share the invite link to start mock interviews.
dashboard.confirm_cancel_prompt: Are you sure? Your partner will be notified.
dashboard.quick_prep_desc: Ready for a quick 10-minute AI mock challenge to brush up on core questions?
dashboard.live_practice_desc: Match with a live peer instantly based on topics, or start a solo interview simulation with our AI interviewer.
dashboard.resume_active_desc: Your resume is active. AI question generation will tailor questions to your projects and background.
dashboard.resume_empty_desc: Upload your resume in PDF format to enable personalized questions tailored to your skills.
dashboard.level_up_desc: Book a peer interview or professional review session today to perfect your system design and coding skills.
dashboard.getting_started_desc: Complete these 4 quick steps to fully configure your preparation workspace.
dashboard.onboarding_ready_title: 🎉 You're Ready to Ace Your Interviews!
dashboard.onboarding_ready_desc: Outstanding job! You've completed your onboarding checklist: your profile is complete, your first session is scheduled, you've tried solo AI practice, and your resume is uploaded. You are fully equipped to launch your mock interviews and start tracking your skill gaps!

matchmaker.title: Find a partner now
matchmaker.no_partner_desc: We couldn't locate a peer matching your selected topic. Please start matchmaking again or invite a colleague directly.

room.no_messages: No messages yet. Type notes or hints here!
room.waiting_question_pick: Waiting for interviewer to pick a question...
room.recording_active_desc: We are converting your speech to text in real-time. Click the microphone again to stop and evaluate.
room.recording_ready_desc: Speak your HR response using web speech recognition. We will analyze your STAR structure and filler words.
room.evaluating_star: Claude is evaluating answer clarity and STAR alignment...
room.console_ready: Console initialized. Ready to execute code solutions.
room.console_running: Compiling and running build inside Judge0 sandboxed runtime...
room.pacing_evaluated: Speaking pacing has been evaluated for this session.
room.no_transcript: No transcript recorded yet. Speak your answer or let the mock run.
room.search_filter_push: Search, filter, and push questions to the candidate
room.title: Title
room.desc_placeholder: e.g. Implement a function that reverses a string input in-place...
room.no_resume_warning: ⚠️ No resume text found in candidate profile. Make sure a PDF resume has been uploaded in Dashboard settings.
room.claude_crafting: Claude is crafting questions for your role...
